roa.docketEntryComment: DEF MOTION TO MODIFY DEF ON ACM / OR CONDITIONS, FILED

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROMDISMISSED CHARGES MAY BEADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO,20005105,/

/CAL: DEFENDANT MOTION TO MODIFY DEF ON ACM OR OR/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TOCOMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/RX/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TOCOMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/WEAP/RX/X: CURFEW FROM 7PM-6AM/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/LDPX: 08-10-20/987,2/ACM/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/FTA/ACMRVKD/BWI/BAIL:50000/BWNUM:1ST/X: 2 OF 3 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/X: LOVE WAIVER/
/CAL: DEFENDANT MOTION TO MODIFY ON ACM-OR CONDITIONS/CONT/COP/
